---
title: "Personal Projects"
from: markdown+emoji
---

Here are some projects that I have worked on so far while learning various things.

+ My Portfolio [web development, technical writing] - [GitHub](https://github.com/koushikkhan/koushikkhan.github.io)

+ Writing gradient descent from scratch [computing, python] - [GitHub](https://github.com/koushikkhan/The-Gradient-Descent-Optimization)

+ A simple pipeline to deploy a machine learning app [ml, deployment, docker] - [GitHub](https://github.com/koushikkhan/flask-ml-service)

+ Automating the boring stuffs after installing a linux distro [linux, shellscript] - [GitHub](https://github.com/koushikkhan/configure-my-linux)

+ A not so short introduction to object oriented programming using R [technical writing] - [Medium](https://medium.com/@koushikkhan38/a-not-so-short-introduction-to-object-oriented-programming-using-r-cd69d732f60?source=friends_link&sk=b65284c634367fc8627815c552777b5a)

+ Stock price forecasting with LSTM network [forecasting, deep learning] - [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1xLgCoQF79MD61Ck45TEbWW9UtyymZGkF?usp=sharing)

+ Playing with word2vec [neural net, nlp, pytorch] - [Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1PJCyPULfcYcsUpkvPeQsu4GNsp5m3b3v?usp=sharing)
